ogTitle: St Fillans vs St Georges Basin: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Fillans and St Georges Basin.
heading: St Fillans vs St Georges Basin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Fillans, New South Wales and St Georges Basin, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Fillans has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to St Georges Basin (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Fillans or St Georges Basin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Fillans has a flood risk score of 32/100, while St Georges Basin scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Fillans scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. St Georges Basin scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Fillans or St Georges Basin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Fillans has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
